paths.@formael/actlint-core: boundary: vocabulary is the base layer and depends on nothing.
paths.@formael/actlint-core/contracts: boundary: vocabulary is the base layer and depends on nothing.
paths.@formael/actlint-reporters: boundary: vocabulary is the base layer and depends on nothing.
paths.@formael/actlint-mcp-fetch: boundary: vocabulary is the base layer and depends on nothing.
paths.actlint: boundary: vocabulary is the base layer and depends on nothing.

paths.@formael/actlint-reporters: boundary: core is pure and downstream of nothing but vocabulary.
paths.@formael/actlint-mcp-fetch: boundary: core must never depend on the impure fetch edge.
paths.actlint: boundary: core must never depend on the CLI shell.

paths.@formael/actlint-mcp-fetch: boundary: reporters are pure and depend only on core/vocabulary.
paths.actlint: boundary: reporters must never depend on the CLI shell.

paths.@formael/actlint-core: boundary: mcp-fetch may import ONLY the shared types at @formael/actlint-core/contracts, never core's scoring.
paths.@formael/actlint-reporters: boundary: mcp-fetch produces a ToolManifest; it does not render.
paths.actlint: boundary: mcp-fetch must never depend on the CLI shell.
